title: xxFOLDxx/boot.init
summary: Linux boot automation workspace with systemd services, desktop autostart, shell scripts, cron jobs, init scripts, and config samples to start apps at boot 🐙.

title: AlexHettle/MeadowPy
summary: Beginner-friendly Python IDE with local AI features, teaching tools, plain-English error help, and step-through debugging.

title: canoo/agent-nexus
summary: Multi-model agentic orchestration framework — route tasks to cloud or local LLMs, manage personas, and configure everything through an interactive TUI.

title: Ahta14/zeroshot-reasoning
summary: Explore zero-shot reasoning strategies with Ollama in this interactive FastAPI project. Visualize AI thought processes using Chain, Tree, and Graph-of-Thought. 🌟💻

title: HEGOM61ita/OffGallery
summary: Catalogatore AI di immagini fotografiche · Compatibile con Lightroom — Tag automatici, Metadata e Ricerca Semantica (Offline, Multilingua) · AI Photo Catalog for Lightroom — Automatic Tagging, Metadata & Semantic Search — Fully Offline

title: hidetheweed11/n8n_ExecutiveBot_Platform
summary: Amin's Smart Telegram Bot integrates Docker, Ollama, and Gemini AI for seamless communication. Enhance your Telegram experience with advanced AI capabilities. 🤖🌟

title: Haidzai/claude-code-proxy
summary: Monitor and visualize your Claude Code API interactions with Claude Code Proxy. Easily set up a transparent proxy and live dashboard. 🛠️🚀

title: Kakz/prometheus-llm
summary: PrometheusLLM is a unique transformer architecture inspired by dignity and recursion. This project aims to explore new frontiers in AI research and welcomes contributions from the community. 🐙🌟

title: makarsuperstar/oni-devops-traces
summary: Open multi-turn DevOps agent traces in JSONL format. Distilled from existing instruction datasets (Magicoder, CommitPack) via gemma4:31b teacher LLM with hand-crafted few-shot from a fine-tuned Qwen3-14B champion. Drop-in for SFT on local 24GB GPUs.

title: DryadeAI/Dryade
summary: Self-hosted AI orchestration platform. Connect any LLM, orchestrate agents, build workflows — all on your infrastructure.

title: SonPari1/Search-Engine-Ui
summary: # Search Engine UI![Search Engine UI Cover](Assets/Image/Cover.jpg)**Search Engine UI** offers a sleek and responsive homepage with essential features like a search bar, live weather, and a bookmark manager. 🚀 This project showcases a modern design using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, making it a perfect tool for enhancing your online experience. 🖥

title: DavidPacasCDB/transcribe-meetings
summary: InsightLens transforms business meetings into actionable, searchable knowledge. It ingests meeting recordings, slides, and chat logs, then uses advanced AI to transcribe.

title: bielz09/Enhanced-HIBP-Checker
summary: Python application that uses local Ollama LLM models to give advice on results found from HIBP (Have I Been Pwned) API

title: Lakatos179/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: ot4ank/auto-openwebui
summary: A bash script to automate running Open WebUI on Linux systems with Ollama and Cloudflare via Docker

title: OpenCognit/Opencognit
summary: The open-source AI agent OS. CEO orchestrator, persistent memory, real execution, atomic budgets. Self-hosted. No cloud lock-in.

title: gumieri/nenya
summary: A lightweight, highly secure AI API Gateway/Proxy written in Go. Acts as transparent middleware between local AI coding clients (OpenCode/Aider) and upstream LLM providers (Gemini, DeepSeek, z.ai).

title: shashank2122/Local-Voice
summary: A real-time, offline voice assistant for Linux and Raspberry Pi. Uses local LLMs (via Ollama), speech-to-text (Vosk), and text-to-speech (Piper) for fast, wake-free voice interaction. No cloud. No APIs. Just Python, a mic, and your voice.

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: cryptokid980/homelab-2-prod-ai-golden-path
summary: This is a golden path (opinionated shortcut) to explore AI from local homelab to PROD using OSS for technological independence and local LLM for privacy. We explore concepts like AI agents, RAG and LLM using OSS technologies like Linux, Opentofu, microk8s, DAPR, Ollama, TimescaleDB & pgai Vectorizer, Flask and Python.
